name: high-assurance-agis-http-message-signature
description: AgIS HTTP Message Signature test vector with nonce for high-assurance replay protection, covering agis-agent, agis-nonce, @method, @target-uri, content-digest, and date.

expected.signature_base:
"agis-agent": agent://example.com/support-agent
"agis-nonce": nonce-2026-06-23-001
"@method": POST
"@target-uri": https://api.service.example/resources/123
"content-digest": sha-256=:EElbeZnbXXnH5AMO46WOKBIN6fvWcuBFv/qlOLFgSYk=:
"date": Tue, 23 Jun 2026 18:30:00 GMT
"@signature-params": ("agis-agent" "agis-nonce" "@method" "@target-uri" "content-digest" "date");created=1782249000;keyid="key-2026-01";alg="ed25519"
